root_goal: Fill semantic search gap in CTX hooks per SOTA research — Tier 1: G2 SQL LIKE→BM25, co-occurrence synonyms, query-type RRF. Validate against G1 (0.746) and G2 external R@5 (0.602) benches.
original_goal: Fill semantic search gap in CTX hooks per SOTA research — Tier 1 implementation + validation.

sub_goals.goal: Replace G2 SQL LIKE with in-process BM25 over graph nodes
Corpus-derived co-occurrence synonyms via auto-index extension
Re-run G1 59-query + G2 external benches, measure delta

reward_spec.threshold: G1 >= 0.746 AND G2 >= 0.602 (no regression), ideally G2 FastAPI +0.10
